name: @sparx/cache-revalidation-worker
description: Sparx cache-revalidation worker. Consumes catalog/content events via Pub/Sub push (Cloud Run HTTP entrypoint), resolves the event's tenant id to its storefront slug, and POSTs the storefront's /api/revalidate endpoint so the Next.js Data Cache for that tenant's scope (commerce/content/site) is purged immediately on a mutation rather than waiting for the TTL. Same shape as services/commerce-indexer.
